response.justification: Mohammed has strong technical depth, extensive experience with developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and a clear passion for engineering productivity, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, team leadership, or organizational change initiatives required for this managerial role, and mobile platform experience is only implied through iOS app maintenance.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven track record in open-source tooling and infrastructure (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Strong cross-stack technical skills with demonstrable impact on performance and automation
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership beyond technical contribution
Mobile platform experience is limited to one iOS app takeover, not ecosystem-wide tooling
Lacks documented experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning
